name: stylus-nexus
description: Stylus Nexus plugins for Claude Code + Codex.

plugins.name: work-plan
plugins.description: Track-aware daily planning over GitHub issues. Shared tracks (git-synced .work-plan/) optionally pinned to a canonical plan branch (plan-branch; push-track promotes a private track to it), AI clustering (group/auto-triage), coverage, plan-status doc liveness with drift detection, batched GraphQL fetches, and dependency-aware next-up with per-track ordering presets. Includes a theme-aware, accessible VS Code viewer — sidebar tree with a visibility×tier exposure badge, a repo-qualified Mermaid dependency graph, per-issue in-progress badge/toggle and dependency chips, next-up controls, proactive auto-slot suggestions with a compare-and-swap collision guard, and a Plans view with confirm-gated frontmatter writes and repository-contained plan links. Installer ownership is content-verified so unmanaged or modified launchers are preserved.

plugins.name: defect-scan
plugins.description: Language-aware defect hunter for Claude Code AND Codex. Detect stack -> triage by risk -> run real analyzers (ruff/mypy, tsc/eslint, rubocop/brakeman, +optional semgrep/gitleaks/bandit) -> reason with battle-tested patterns + 15 language profiles (python, react-typescript, ruby, go, csharp, java, kotlin, swift, objc, php, rust, yaml, shell, dart) -> report (confidence-tiered, severity/priority, gh-issue-correlated) -> optionally file deduped/labeled issues (--file-issues), apply safe fixes (--fix), or second-opinion via Codex (--cross-model). Runs on macOS/Linux/Windows (WSL/Git-Bash or PowerShell shim); model-free eval harness; extensible drop-in profiles/patterns.
